title: Will Elon Musk Merge Tesla With SpaceX After xAI Deal?

Adding up the valuations of SpaceX, xAI and Tesla would create a roughly $2.8 trillion company.

AMD said its forecast for the current quarter also includes approximately $100 million in sales of its MI308 ‌AI chips to China, after the company had excluded it from sales forecasts for the fourth quarter in November.
